name: stockyard-keypool
description: API key pooling and rotation for LLM providers. Round-robin, least-used, or random strategies. Auto-rotate on 429 rate limits.

tools.name: keypool_status
tools.description: Get status of all pooled API keys: active, cooldown, usage counts, last error.

tools.name: keypool_add_key
tools.description: Add a new API key to the pool.

tools.name: keypool_remove_key
tools.description: Remove an API key from the pool by name.

tools.name: keypool_stats
tools.description: Get pool statistics: requests per key, 429 counts, rotation events.

tools.name: keypool_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the KeyPool proxy is running and healthy.
